name: dockerfile-deploy
description:
Production Dockerfile for Next.js apps. Multi-stage (builder + runner), node:20-alpine base, OpenSSL for Prisma engine detection, non-root user (uid 1001), HEALTHCHECK, frozen-lockfile install. Schema is copied BEFORE install so the `postinstall` (prisma generate) hook can find it — a landmine real projects have hit.

Pattern source: a production NestJS Dockerfile (verbatim shape, simplified for single-package projects).

Build: `docker build -t {{project.name}} .`
Run: `docker run -p 3000:3000 --env-file .env.local {{project.name}}`
